controls.title: Documented DevOps Security Policies
controls.description: Do you maintain documented security policies governing development and infrastructure operations (environment standards, access controls, deployment procedures)?

controls.title: Accountability for DevOps Security
controls.description: Is there a clearly designated person or team accountable for development and infrastructure security (policy maintenance, security reviews)?

controls.title: Development Environment Isolation
controls.description: Do you maintain requirements for development environment isolation and separation from production systems?

controls.title: Development Tools Approval
controls.description: Do you maintain criteria for evaluating and approving development tools before use (IDEs, extensions, AI usage)?

controls.title: Repository Access Control
controls.description: Do you maintain access control procedures for source code repositories with role-based permissions?

controls.title: Repository Security Controls
controls.description: Do you enforce repository security controls for protected branches (branch protection, commit signing, multi-party review)?

controls.title: Secret Scanning
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for scanning source code for accidentally committed secrets?

controls.title: External Contributor Review
controls.description: Do you have procedures for enhanced review of code contributions from external collaborators?

controls.title: Package Verification
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for verifying package authenticity and preventing supply chain attacks (trusted sources, typosquatting detection)?

controls.title: Dependency Vulnerability Management
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for dependency vulnerability management (scanning, version control, periodic audits)?

controls.title: Pipeline Change Controls
controls.description: Do you require approval controls for modifications to deployment pipelines and build configurations?

controls.title: Secrets Management
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for secure management of pipeline and application secrets?

controls.title: Pipeline Access Controls
controls.description: Do you enforce access controls for pipeline execution (service account separation, restricted manual deployment)?

controls.title: Infrastructure as Code
controls.description: Do you maintain requirements for managing infrastructure through code with version control and security review?

controls.title: Infrastructure Access Controls
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for infrastructure access controls (individual accounts, time-limited privileges, break-glass procedures)?

controls.title: Backup and Disaster Recovery
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for backup and disaster recovery with periodic testing?

controls.title: Cloud Security Monitoring
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for monitoring cloud security configurations and administrative activity?

controls.title: Cloud Provider Notifications
controls.description: Do you have procedures for receiving and responding to cloud service provider security notifications?

controls.title: Domain Management Policies and Procedures
controls.description: Do you maintain documented policies and procedures governing domain management operations?

controls.title: Accountability for Domain Security
controls.description: Is there a clearly designated person or team accountable for domain security (policy maintenance, security reviews, renewal management)?

controls.title: Domain Inventory and Attributes
controls.description: Do you maintain a comprehensive inventory of all domains including ownership, purpose, criticality classification, expiration dates, and relationships to business services/applications?

controls.title: Current Configuration Baselines for Critical Domains
controls.description: Do you document and maintain current configuration baselines for all critical domains (DNS records, security settings, registrar configurations)?

controls.title: Formal Domain Classification System
controls.description: Do you maintain a formal classification system for domains based on criticality, financial exposure, and operational impact?

controls.title: Mapping Domain Classifications to Controls
controls.description: Do you map domain classifications to required security controls (monitoring frequency, approval requirements, backup procedures)?

controls.title: Registrar and DNS Provider Security Criteria
controls.description: Do you maintain security evaluation criteria for selecting domain registrars and DNS hosting providers?

controls.title: Procedures for Registrar Access
controls.description: Do you maintain documented procedures for managing access to domain registrar accounts?

controls.title: Multi-factor Authentication for Registrar Accounts
controls.description: Do you enforce multi-factor authentication requirements for all registrar and DNS management accounts?

controls.title: Dedicated Domain Security Contact Email
controls.description: Do you maintain a separate, dedicated security contact email for domain management that is independent from your primary domain?

controls.title: Periodic Access Reviews for Domain Privileges
controls.description: Do you conduct periodic access reviews for all personnel with domain management privileges?

controls.title: Approval Workflows for Critical Domain Operations
controls.description: Do you maintain documented approval workflows for critical domain operations (transfers, deletions, nameserver changes)?

controls.title: DNS Security Configuration Standards
controls.description: Do you maintain documented standards for DNS security configurations (DNSSEC, CAA records, TTL policies)?

controls.title: Email Authentication Protocol Standards
controls.description: Do you maintain documented standards for email authentication (SPF, DKIM, DMARC, MTA-STS)?

controls.title: DMARC Monitoring and Response Procedures
controls.description: Do you have procedures for monitoring and responding to DMARC reports and policy violations?

controls.title: Documented Domain Lock Procedures
controls.description: Do you maintain documented procedures for implementing domain locks (transfer locks, registry locks, EPP status codes)?

controls.title: Out of Band Domain Change Verification
controls.description: Do you have procedures for out-of-band verification of domain changes through registrar support channels?

controls.title: TLS Certificate Lifecycle Management Procedures
controls.description: Do you maintain documented procedures for TLS certificate lifecycle management, including issuance, renewal, revocation, and monitoring for expiration across all domains and services?

controls.title: Domain Registration Lifecycle Procedures
controls.description: Do you maintain documented procedures for domain registration, renewal, decommissioning, and expiration prevention (auto-renewal, multiple reminders, backup payment methods)?

controls.title: Secure Domain Transfer Procedures
controls.description: Do you maintain documented procedures for secure domain transfers between registrars?

controls.title: DNS Change Management Procedures
controls.description: Do you maintain formal change management procedures for DNS record modifications?

controls.title: Continuous Monitoring for DNS Changes
controls.description: Do you maintain continuous monitoring for unauthorized DNS record changes across all critical domains?

controls.title: DNS Compromise Indicators Monitoring
controls.description: Do you monitor for specific indicators of DNS compromise (TTL changes, nameserver modifications, record anomalies)?

controls.title: Monitor Certificate Transparency Logs
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for monitoring Certificate Transparency logs for unauthorized certificate issuance?

controls.title: Unauthorized Domain Registration Monitoring
controls.description: Do you monitor domain registration status and registrar lock settings for unauthorized changes?

controls.title: Detecting Domain Expiration Risks
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for detecting and responding to domain expiration risks?

controls.title: Domain Hijacking Incident Response
controls.description: Do you maintain incident response procedures specific to domain hijacking and DNS compromise scenarios?

controls.title: Registrar and DNS Emergency Contacts
controls.description: Do you maintain emergency contact information for registrars and DNS hosting providers?

controls.title: Emergency Registry Lock Activation
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for emergency registry lock activation to prevent unauthorized domain changes?

controls.title: Regaining Control of Compromised Domains
controls.description: Do you have documented procedures for regaining control of compromised domains?

controls.title: DNS Record Integrity Validation Procedures
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for validating DNS record integrity after incident recovery?

controls.title: Documented Incident Response Policy
controls.description: Do you maintain a documented incident response (IR) policy that defines scope, objectives, and roles?

controls.title: Incident Commander and IR Roles
controls.description: Do you have a designated incident commander and incident response team with clearly defined roles, responsibilities, and decision-making authority? Is the incident commander role clearly established to coordinate response activities, make time-sensitive decisions, and ensure clear accountability during incidents?

controls.title: Subject Matter Experts for Protocol Internals
controls.description: Do you have designated subject matter experts (ex. Core Devs) who understand different parts of protocol internals and can analyze ongoing attacks and prepare response strategies for potential attack vectors?

controls.title: Designated Signer Roles for Emergency Actions
controls.description: Do you have designated signer roles with documented authority and procedures for executing emergency transactions (pausing, freezing, parameter changes)?

controls.title: Periodic Review of IR Roles
controls.description: Do you periodically review and update IR team roles, authorities, and escalation measures to reflect protocol changes, new teams, or evolving governance structures?

controls.title: Communications Personnel for Public Info
controls.description: Do you have designated Communications personnel responsible for public information sharing and incident response record-keeping?

controls.title: Legal Support for Incident Response
controls.description: Do you maintain Legal support with documented procedures for analyzing legal and regulatory implications of response actions, approving whitehat engagement agreements, and reviewing public communications?

controls.title: Procedures for Cross-Team Incident Coordination
controls.description: Do you have documented procedures for coordinating between technical teams (Core Devs/Auditors) and operational teams (Security Council/Communications) during incidents?

controls.title: External Protocol Stakeholder Contact Methods
controls.description: Do you maintain contact methods & communication channels for external companies that run protocols you depend on, or that depend on your protocol?

controls.title: 24/7 Monitoring and After-Hours Procedures
controls.description: Do you maintain documented monitoring coverage for critical systems, protocols, and infrastructure components with 24/7 capabilities and procedures for after-hours alert handling?

controls.title: Automated Alerting with Playbooks
controls.description: Do you have automated alerting configured with embedded playbooks for security events, detecting false alarms, and operational issues?

controls.title: Regular Alert Testing and Drills
controls.description: Do you conduct regular alert testing and drills to ensure monitoring systems function correctly under various scenarios?

controls.title: Procedures for Alert Triage and Escalation
controls.description: Do you have documented procedures for alert triage, classification, and escalation to appropriate response teams?

controls.title: Log Retention Policies for Forensics
controls.description: Do you maintain log retention policies with adequate preservation periods for security and infrastructure logs (including cloud provider logs) to support incident investigation and forensic analysis?

controls.title: Leaked Credential Monitoring
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for monitoring leaked credentials and compromised accounts associated with the organization?

controls.title: Social Media Compromise Monitoring
controls.description: Do you have procedures for monitoring organizational social media accounts & websites for indicators of compromise or unauthorized activity?

controls.title: Immutable Logging and Tamper-Evident Alerting
controls.description: Do you maintain requirements for immutable logging and tamper-evident alerting channels that trigger alerts if logs are altered or monitoring is disabled?

controls.title: Redundant Paging Systems with Testing
controls.description: Do you operate redundant paging systems with documented procedures and regular testing?

controls.title: Maintain On-Call Coverage Schedules
controls.description: Do you maintain current on-call schedules with documented coverage requirements and backup procedures?

controls.title: Documented Time-Based Escalation Procedures
controls.description: Do you have documented escalation procedures with time-based triggers and management notification requirements?

controls.title: Define and Track Response Time Targets
controls.description: Do you define and track response time targets for different incident severity levels?

controls.title: Documented Incident Response Playbooks
controls.description: Do you maintain documented response playbooks for common incident types (protocol exploits, infrastructure failures, access control breaches, data security incidents, and supply chain compromises)?

controls.title: Step-by-Step Initial Response Procedures
controls.description: Do you have step-by-step procedures for initial response actions including containment, evidence preservation, and stakeholder notification?

controls.title: Role-Based Incident Playbooks by Role
controls.description: Do you maintain role-based playbooks that define specific responsibilities for different team members (Core Devs, Auditors, Signers, Communications, Legal) during incidents?

controls.title: Procedures for Coordinating Multisig Operations
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for coordinating multisig operations during incidents including signer availability and cross-timezone challenges?

controls.title: Documented Criteria for Major Response Decisions
controls.description: Do you have documented criteria for major response decisions (system shutdown, public disclosure, external assistance) and escalation policies for when to engage leadership?

controls.title: External Expertise Engagement Contacts
controls.description: Do you maintain contact information and procedures for engaging external expertise (forensics, legal, specialized consultants)?

controls.title: Emergency Cards with Key Response Steps
controls.description: Do you maintain emergency cards or quick-reference materials containing key personnel and response steps for each protocol component?

controls.title: Multiple Channels for Global Signer Reach
controls.description: Do you maintain multiple communication channels (primary and backup) with documented procedures for reaching signers across time zones, including during emergencies?

controls.title: Pre-Signed Emergency Transactions for Protocol
controls.description: Do you maintain pre-signed emergency transactions for critical protocol functions (pause, freeze, parameter changes)?

controls.title: Procedures for Rapid Emergency Transactions
controls.description: Do you have documented procedures for rapidly executing emergency transactions with minimal coordination time?

controls.title: Multiple Signing Methods and Backups
controls.description: Do you maintain multiple signing methods and backup procedures for signers transaction execution?

controls.title: Rotating Keys and Replacing Signers
controls.description: Do you have a documented procedure for rotating keys and replacing compromised signers?

controls.title: Dedicated Incident Communication Channels
controls.description: Do you maintain dedicated communication channels for incident response with documented access controls, member lists, and procedures for rapidly creating new incident-specific channels when needed?

controls.title: Incident Status Reporting Procedures
controls.description: Do you have documented procedures for incident status reporting including frequency, format, and distribution lists?

controls.title: Secure Incident Information Communications
controls.description: Do you maintain secure communication procedures for sensitive incident information?

controls.title: Coordinating Communications with Protocol Users
controls.description: Do you maintain documented procedures for coordinating communications with protocol users during and post-exploit?

controls.title: Approved Templates and Escalation Procedures
controls.description: Do you have pre-approved communication templates and escalation procedures for different incident types and severity levels?

controls.title: Public Information Flow and Misinformation Prevention
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for managing public information flow and preventing misinformation during active incidents?

controls.title: Regular Incident Response Drills and Evaluation
controls.description: Do you conduct regular incident response drills that test pager systems, escalation procedures, team coordination, monitoring systems, containment procedures, and recovery processes? Do you evaluate drill performance, identify gaps, and track improvement actions based on both exercise findings and real incident experience?

controls.title: Policies Governing Multisig Operations
controls.description: Do you maintain documented policies and procedures governing your multisig operations?

controls.title: Named Responsible Multisig Owner
controls.description: Is there a clearly named person or team accountable for multisig operations (policy upkeep, reviews, hygiene)?

controls.title: Multisig Documentation Maintenance Process
controls.description: Do you operate a documented maintenance process to keep multisig documentation current after any operational or signer change?

controls.title: Current Multisig Registry Details
controls.description: Do you keep an up-to-date registry of all multisigs (address, network, purpose, threshold, modules/guards, admin roles, etc)?

controls.title: Authorized Signer Mapping Registry
controls.description: Do you maintain an up-to-date list of authorized signers and map them to the correct multisigs?

controls.title: Formal Multisig Classification System
controls.description: Do you define and maintain a formal classification system for multisig wallets that covers both impact factors and operational needs?

controls.title: Classification Criteria and Controls
controls.description: Do you maintain documented criteria that map each classification level to required controls (thresholds, quorum composition, review cadence, etc)?

controls.title: Review and Update Classifications
controls.description: Do you periodically review and update classifications and associated controls when conditions change?

controls.title: Timelocks, Modules, and Guards Policies
controls.description: Do you maintain documented policies on the use of timelocks, modules and guards, including justification and security review requirements for any exceptions?

controls.title: Exception Approval Process for Multisig
controls.description: Do you maintain a documented exception approval process for deviations from standard multisig policies, including justification requirements, and authorization levels?

controls.title: Cryptographic Signer Identity Attestation
controls.description: Do you maintain a documented process for cryptographic attestation of address ownership and signer affiliation for multisig signers?

controls.title: Signer Key Management Standard
controls.description: Do you maintain a documented standard for signer key management?

controls.title: Signer Seed Backups and Protection
controls.description: Do you maintain documented policies and procedures for securely backing up and protecting signer seed phrases and recovery materials?

controls.title: Multisig Signer Lifecycle Management
controls.description: Do you operate a documented lifecycle for adding, replacing, and removing signers, including offboarding and periodic access reviews?

controls.title: Signer Training and Readiness Program
controls.description: Do you have a documented training and readiness program for signers before they are authorized to participate?

controls.title: Documented Transaction Lifecycle Procedures
controls.description: Do you maintain documented processes for transaction initiation, approval, simulation, execution, and confirmation, including who is authorized to initiate?

controls.title: Signing and Verification Procedures
controls.description: Do you maintain documented signing and verification procedures that must be followed before any signatures are applied?

controls.title: Audit Trails and Retention
controls.description: Do you maintain audit trails and retention for transaction reviews, approvals, execution, and post-execution confirmation?

controls.title: Policy for High-Risk Transactions
controls.description: Do you maintain a policy defining enhanced controls for high-risk transactions (emergency actions, large transfers, protocol configuration changes)?

controls.title: Multisig Standards and Evaluation
controls.description: Do you maintain documented standards for multisig technology and tools, and a formal evaluation process for adopting new ones?

controls.title: Backup Infrastructure for Multisig
controls.description: Do you maintain documented backup infrastructure for multisig operations (alternate signing interfaces, RPC/explorers, failover procedures), and test their use?

controls.title: Multisig Primary and Backup Communications
controls.description: Do you maintain dedicated primary and backup communication channels for multisig operations with documented membership controls and onboarding/offboarding procedures?

controls.title: Signer Identity Verification Procedures
controls.description: Do you have procedures to verify the identity of signers during sensitive communications, with periodic checks to ensure authenticity?

controls.title: Documented Escalation and On-Call Policies
controls.description: Do you maintain documented escalation policies that define response-time expectations, on-call coverage, and procedures for urgent coordination?

controls.title: Channel Compromise Response and Verification
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for responding to suspected communication channel compromise, including switching to backup channels and out-of-band verification, and ensure signers know how to invoke them?

controls.title: Emergency Contacts for Multisig
controls.description: Do you maintain and distribute an up-to-date emergency contact list for multisig operations?

controls.title: Emergency Playbooks for Compromise
controls.description: Do you maintain written emergency playbooks covering key compromise, lost access, and urgent protocol actions?

controls.title: 24/7 Paging for Emergency Multisigs
controls.description: For critical/emergency-class multisigs, do you provide 24/7 paging to reach the required threshold and document escalation paths?

controls.title: Multisig Monitoring and Alerts
controls.description: Do you maintain monitoring infrastructure and procedures to detect unauthorized, anomalous, or suspicious activity across all multisigs, with documented alerting and escalation paths?

controls.title: Rehearsals for Emergency Playbooks
controls.description: Do you conduct periodic rehearsals and drills of emergency playbooks to test response procedures, communication channels, and signer coordination under simulated emergency conditions?

controls.title: Documented Treasury Security Policies
controls.description: Do you maintain documented security policies that define how treasury operations are conducted (e.g., access control principles, transaction verification requirements, incident response procedures)?

controls.title: Accountability for Treasury Operations
controls.description: Is there an individual or team accountable for treasury operations (e.g., policy upkeep, reviews, operational hygiene)?

controls.title: Treasury Infrastructure Change Management
controls.description: Do you maintain formal change management procedures for treasury infrastructure modifications (e.g., wallet setups, custody configurations, signer permissions, protocol integrations)?

controls.title: Treasury Wallet Risk Classification
controls.description: Do you have a documented process to classify treasury wallets (e.g. multisigs) and accounts based on risk level and assign appropriate security controls?

controls.title: Custodial vs Non-Custodial Rationale
controls.description: Do you have documented rationale for choosing between custodial and non-custodial treasury solutions and technology choice like MPC, HSM?

controls.title: Fund Allocation Limits and Triggers
controls.description: Do you have documented policies for maximum fund allocations per wallet type and rebalancing triggers?

controls.title: Custody Platform Security Configurations
controls.description: Do you maintain documented security configurations for custody platforms, including: Transaction policy rules, Multi-approval workflows and thresholds, Address whitelisting configurations, Velocity Limits)?

controls.title: Treasury Platform Authentication Requirements
controls.description: Do you maintain documented authentication requirements for treasury platforms (e.g., multi-factor authentication standards, session management)?

controls.title: Credential and Secret Management Procedures
controls.description: Do you have procedures for managing credentials and secrets used in treasury operations (e.g., API keys, service accounts)?

controls.title: Access Review for Treasury Systems
controls.description: Do you conduct periodic reviews of who has access to treasury systems to ensure only authorized personnel retain access?

controls.title: Treasury Network Security Controls
controls.description: Do you implement network security controls for treasury access (IP whitelisting, VPN requirements, Geographic access restrictions)?

controls.title: Isolate Owner Account Credentials
controls.description: Do you implement controls to isolate owner account credentials?

controls.title: Transaction Security and Verification Procedures
controls.description: Do you maintain documented procedures for transaction security and verification?

controls.title: Training for All Signers
controls.description: Do you conduct traning programs with all signers?

controls.title: Pre-Execution Transaction Verification Procedures
controls.description: Do you have procedures for verifying transaction details before execution (e.g., recipient address validation, amount verification, network confirmation, test transactions, simulation requirements)?

controls.title: Secure Communication Procedures for Treasury
controls.description: Do you maintain secure communication procedures for coordinating treasury operations and verifying requests?

controls.title: Documented Funds Receiving Procedures
controls.description: Do you have documented procedures for receiving funds?

controls.title: Procedures for OTC Transactions
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for conducting OTC (over-the-counter) transactions?

controls.title: DeFi Protocol Evaluation and Monitoring
controls.description: Do you maintain documented procedures for evaluating and monitoring DeFi protocols where treasury funds are deployed?

controls.title: Documented Procedures for DeFi Positions
controls.description: Do you have documented procedures for managing DeFi positions (e.g., emergency withdrawal procedures, alternative access methods if UIs are unavailable)?

controls.title: Exposure Limits for Protocol Deployments
controls.description: Do you define and enforce exposure limits for protocol deployments (e.g., per protocol, chain, category)?

controls.title: Verifying Contract Addresses and Approvals
controls.description: Do you have procedures for verifying smart contract addresses and managing token approvals?

controls.title: Evaluating and Monitoring Staking Solutions
controls.description: Do you maintain documented procedures for evaluating and monitoring staking solutions where treasury funds are deployed?

controls.title: Staking Position Management Procedures
controls.description: Do you have documented procedures for managing staking positions (e.g., unstaking procedures, emergency exit methods, alternative access if primary UIs are unavailable)?

controls.title: Exposure Limits for Staking Deployments
controls.description: Do you define and enforce exposure limits for staking deployments (e.g. per staking provider, per liquid staking protocol, etc)?

controls.title: Verifying Smart Contract Addresses
controls.description: Do you have procedures for verifying smart contract addresses?

controls.title: Operational Security Requirements for Treasury Personnel
controls.description: Do you maintain documented operational security requirements for treasury personnel (signing device setup, device security requirements, etc)?

controls.title: Treasury Sensitive Information Security Policy
controls.description: Do you have policies for secure storage and handling of sensitive treasury information (e.g., credentials, hardware wallets, backup materials)?

controls.title: Travel Security Procedures for Treasury Personnel
controls.description: Do you have travel security procedures for treasury personnel with signing/access capabilities?

controls.title: Monitoring Treasury Transactions for Anomalies
controls.description: Do you monitor treasury transactions and account states for anomalous activity?

controls.title: Treasury Security Incident Response Procedures
controls.description: Do you maintain security incident response procedures specific to treasury operations (e.g., severity levels, escalation, containment, fund protection)?

controls.title: External Threat Intelligence for Treasury
controls.description: Do you track external threat intelligence relevant to your treasury holdings and infrastructure (e.g., protocol vulnerabilities, DeFi risks)?

controls.title: Regular Security Drills and Exercises
controls.description: Do you conduct regular security drills and exercises to test incident response capabilities?

controls.title: Vendor Availability and Service Notifications Monitoring
controls.description: Do you monitor for vendor availability and service notifications (e.g., custody platform status, infrastructure provider alerts)?

controls.title: Transactions and Wallet Addresses Monitoring
controls.description: Do you monitor transactions and wallet addresses for compliance risk?

controls.title: Third-Party Services Security Evaluation
controls.description: Do you maintain security evaluation criteria for third-party services critical to treasury operations, including initial due diligence and ongoing monitoring?

controls.title: Vendor Security Control
controls.description: Do you have procedures to verify vendors are implementing the security controls they contractually committed to?

controls.title: Backup and Alternate Access
controls.description: Do you have backup infrastructure and alternate access methods for treasury continuity?

controls.title: Transaction Recording Procedures
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for recording all treasury transactions in your accounting system with appropriate categorization and documentation?

controls.title: Periodic Reconciliation
controls.description: Do you conduct periodic reconciliation between Custody platform records, Blockchain balances, Accounting records, etc?

controls.title: Documented Procedures
controls.description: Do you have documented procedures for treasury-related financial reporting?

controls.title: Insurance Coverage
controls.description: Do you maintain insurance coverage appropriate for your treasury operations?

controls.title: Documented Workspace Security Policies
controls.description: Do you maintain documented security policies governing workspace operations (device standards, account management, access control)?

controls.title: Accountability for Workspace Security
controls.description: Is there a clearly designated person or team accountable for workspace security (policy maintenance, reviews)?

controls.title: Policy Review and Update Process
controls.description: Do you operate a documented review and update process for security policies with defined triggers (incidents, technology updates)?

controls.title: Device Ownership and Security Status
controls.description: Do you maintain an inventory of organizational devices (laptops, phones, tablets) that tracks ownership and critical security status (encryption, OS version)?

controls.title: Accounts Inventory and Ownership
controls.description: Do you maintain an inventory of organizational accounts (email, cloud services, social media, DNS, development tools) with defined ownership?

controls.title: Information Classification by Sensitivity
controls.description: Do you classify information and systems based on sensitivity and criticality to determine appropriate security controls?

controls.title: Security Requirements for Company Devices
controls.description: Do you maintain documented security requirements for company issued devices (encryption, authentication, patching, software restrictions)?

controls.title: Device Provisioning and Compliance
controls.description: Do you have procedures for provisioning devices according to security requirements and verifying ongoing compliance?

controls.title: Device Supply Chain Security
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for device procurement through verified supply chains and verification of device integrity upon receipt?

controls.title: Device Access Authentication Requirements
controls.description: Do you enforce authentication requirements for device access (password complexity, timeout settings, lock screens)?

controls.title: Administrative Privilege Management on Devices
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for managing administrative privileges on devices (separation from daily use accounts, approval processes)?

controls.title: Corporate vs Personal Device Usage Policies
controls.description: Do you maintain policies distinguishing between corporate and personal device usage with appropriate security controls?

controls.title: Remote Device Management for Loss/Compromise
controls.description: Do you have procedures for remotely managing organizational devices in case of loss or compromise (remote lock/wipe capabilities)?

controls.title: Secure Device Decommissioning Procedures
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for secure device decommissioning including data sanitization?

controls.title: Lost or Stolen Device Procedures
controls.description: Do you have documented procedures for responding to lost or stolen devices?

controls.title: EDR/MDM Deployment and Monitoring
controls.description: Do you maintain endpoint detection and response (EDR) or mobile device management (MDM) solutions on organizational devices with documented deployment and monitoring procedures?

controls.title: EDR/MDM Alert Response Procedures
controls.description: Do you have procedures for responding to EDR/MDM alerts and enforcing compliance with security policies through these platforms?

controls.title: Browser and Application Security
controls.description: Do you maintain policies for browser and application security (browser isolation, extension approval, external file handling)?

controls.title: Physical Workspace Security
controls.description: Do you maintain requirements for physical workspace security for both on-site and remote work environments?

controls.title: User Account Provisioning Lifecycle
controls.description: Do you have procedures for provisioning, modifying, and deprovisioning user accounts with appropriate approvals?

controls.title: MFA Enforcement with Exceptions
controls.description: Do you enforce multi-factor authentication for critical accounts with a documented exceptions process?

controls.title: Security Configuration Standards Maintenance
controls.description: Do you maintain security configuration standards for enterprise platforms (Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, collaboration tools)?

controls.title: Periodic Access Reviews and Revocation
controls.description: Do you conduct periodic access reviews for corporate systems with documented revocation procedures?

controls.title: Organizational Social Media Security
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for securing organizational social media and external service accounts?

controls.title: Ownership Verification for External Accounts
controls.description: Do you have procedures for verifying ownership and preventing unauthorized use of organizational external accounts?

controls.title: Account Security Controls
controls.description: Do you maintain policies for account security controls (recovery method restrictions, organizational identity verification)?

controls.title: Domain Registration and DNS Management
controls.description: Do you maintain security procedures for domain registration and DNS management (registrar lock, change controls)?

controls.title: DNS Change Validation and Approval
controls.description: Do you have procedures for validating and approving DNS changes with appropriate documentation?

controls.title: Password Policy Requirements and Rotation
controls.description: Do you maintain documented password requirements with risk-based complexity and rotation standards?

controls.title: Secure Password Storage and Transmission
controls.description: Do you have procedures for secure password storage and transmission (password managers, encrypted channels)?

controls.title: Credential Rotation Based on Risk
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for credential rotation based on risk, time intervals, or security events?

controls.title: Enhanced Controls for High-Privilege Credentials
controls.description: Do you have enhanced controls for high-privilege credentials (admin accounts, service accounts, API keys)?

controls.title: Account Sharing Prohibition
controls.description: Do you maintain policies prohibiting credential sharing and requiring individual accounts for accountability?

controls.title: Evaluation Criteria for Development Tools
controls.description: Do you maintain criteria for evaluating and approving development tools (IDEs, extensions, libraries, AI assistants)?

controls.title: Access Control for Source Code Repositories
controls.description: Do you maintain access control procedures for source code repositories with role-based permissions?

controls.title: Sensitive Data Exposure Prevention in Repositories
controls.description: Do you have procedures for preventing exposure of sensitive information in code repositories?

controls.title: Dev Dependencies and Supply Chain Management
controls.description: Do you have procedures for managing development dependencies and supply chain risks?

controls.title: Secure Network Access Procedures
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for secure network access including remote access methods (primarily for organizations with physical offices - if not select N/A)?

controls.title: Secure Organizational Communication Channels
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for securing organizational communication channels (email, messaging, collaboration tools)?

controls.title: Identity Verification for Sensitive Communications
controls.description: Do you have procedures for verifying identity in sensitive communications to prevent impersonation?

controls.title: Employee Travel Security Procedures
controls.description: Do you maintain security procedures specific to employee travel (device handling, network usage, data access)?

controls.title: Workspace Security Incident Response
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for detecting and responding to workspace security incidents (account takeovers, data leaks, device compromise)?

controls.title: Workspace Incident Response Procedures
controls.description: Do you have documented response procedures for different types of workspace security incidents?

controls.title: Security Onboarding: Provisioning and Training
controls.description: Do you maintain security onboarding procedures including device provisioning, account creation, and initial training?

controls.title: Pre-Access Identity and Authorization Verification
controls.description: Do you have procedures for verifying employee identity and authorization before granting access?

controls.title: Workspace Security Awareness Program Updates
controls.description: Do you maintain a security awareness program covering workspace security topics with regular updates?

controls.title: Phishing and Social Engineering Testing
controls.description: Do you conduct regular phishing simulations and social engineering awareness exercises with follow-up training for personnel who fail?

controls.title: Offboarding Procedures: Access Revocation and Return
controls.description: Do you maintain comprehensive offboarding procedures including access revocation, device return, and credential rotation?

controls.title: Adjusting Access Rights on Role Change
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for adjusting access rights when employees change roles?

controls.title: Periodic Review of Access Permissions
controls.description: Do you conduct periodic reviews to identify and remove unnecessary access permissions?

controls.title: Insider Threat Assessment
controls.description: Do you conduct insider threat assessments to identify potential damage scenarios and ensure access is minimized for each role?

controls.title: Third-Party Access Management
controls.description: Do you maintain procedures for managing third-party access (time-limits, purpose-specific permissions, audit trails)?
